name_romaji: Koiso Kuniaki cho "Katsuzan kōsō" no genkō
name_en: Manuscript of Katsuzan Koso by Koiso Kuniaki
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of historical materials, the manuscript of Katsuzan Koso written by Koiso Kuniaki. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1972-09-22.

A tangible cultural property in the field of historical materials, the chronicle of Uyo Semboku. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Horibatamachi, Shinjo City. It was designated on 1973-04-09.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of historical materials, a letter of Oyama Kakunosuke mounted on a folding screen. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1973-04-09.

name_romaji: Ushū Mogami-gun narabini Murayama-gun no uchi Tozawa Kazusanosuke ryōnai ezu

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of historical materials, a pictorial map of Tozawa Kazusanosuke's territory within the Mogami and Murayama districts of Ushu. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1979-10-29.

description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, the great mulberry tree of Harako grove. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 2014-01-29.
